title: Gorilla Grip Heavy Duty 100% Granite Mortar and Pestle Set, Slip Resistant Foam Base, Grind Spice and Herbs, Stone Molcajete Bowl for Guacamole, Salsa, Garlic Crusher Kitchen Tool, 1.5 Cup, Gray
description:
About this item
BUILT GORILLA GRIP TOUGH: the last mortar and pestle set you will ever buy, the Gorilla Grip Mortar and Pestle Set is ultra durable and built tough; featuring a heavy duty grinding pestle that crushes and mashes ingredients effortlessly, the mortar and pestle is ultra durable, and scratch resistant; its heavy base helps keep it in place and resist slipping and sliding, even while crushing the heaviest of ingredients
100 PERCENT NATURAL GRANITE: Gorilla Grip granite is sourced from natural granite mines, then handcrafted with care; granite is cut, shaped and polished into the mortar and pestle; natural granite has been used for generations due to its natural durability and long lasting use; no more heavy mixers or food processors, this granite mortar and pestle set takes the effort out of food prep while also helps release the natural flavors of the ingredients
GUACAMOLE, SPICES, NUTS, AND MORE: not just for guacamole, the mortar and pestle set is a great option for nearly any ingredient; crush up spices and herbs; create homemade pesto by grinding up nuts and seeds; serve up fresh dips; even a great choice for homemade dressings and salsas; impress your entire guest list with the tastiest dishes ever
NON SCRATCH BOTTOM: even though the mortar and pestle set is heavy duty, it resists scratching countertops and surfaces; it features an optional foam bottom underside that helps protect surfaces, while also helping to prevent slipping and sliding while you prep
LARGE CAPACITY MORTAR AND PESTLE IS A PERFECT GIFT: mortar and pestle set comes in 3 sizes; large size measures 5.2” x 3.2”, weighs 3.9lbs, and holds up to 1.5 cups of ingredients; a perfect year round gift for anyone who enjoys cooking; beautifully designed so that it can be displayed on any countertop and add to the décor of the kitchen
reviews_5s:
Fantastic mortar and pestle! I was a little overwhelmed by the selection of granite mortar and pestles here on Amazon, but chose the Gorilla Grip Medium based on reviews and pics—looked sturdy, well made, and the reviews consensus agreed. And they were right—this thing is the prefect weight and does it’s job very well, and rinses sparkling clean with only water (after proper seasoning). I’ve been impressed and wonder how I got along without this thing for so long.

If you’re on the fence about size—the medium (6”) is a good adequate size for those cooking for 2-3 people, maybe even for 4, depends on appetites. Largish quantities of spices and aromatics are no problem, what I am talking about here is guacamole or pesto.

Seasoning was easy enough—my second batch of rice came out white, but I did a third round, filling the mortar cup about 3/4 full of rice to focus on grinding at the sides; it’s easy to grind away at the bottom and the overall lower bowl during seasoning, but the sides are a little trickier...! Finished my seasoning by smashing to a paste two batches of garlic/ginger/cumin seeds/coriander seeds, spreading it evenly all over the interior of the mortar and over the pestle, and then letting it sit on overnight (12 hours). A little excessive? Yeah, but it allowed me to use and bond with this great new kitchen ally, and it’s now easy to rinse very clean with no trace of odor/residue lingering within the unpolished granite whatsoever. Highly recommend this mortar and pestle!First I love not just how Amazon packaged it, the boxes that were used was very thoughtful, THANKS AMAZON. YOU GUYS ARE GREAT. Now for the bowl, it's heavier than it appears. It's deeper than I expected, and stronger than it looks. I also didn't have to grip to it while grinding my cloves. Following the included instructions really bought out the flavor of my Chia tea.The only downside is that it needs a good wash before use to get rid of the dust from manufacturing. This is a good mortar pestle, sturdy as heck. I have fine motor disability and this was still easy to use. The roughness of the stone helps with the grinding. The handle fits nicely and grips well. The non slip pad works well for the bottom, keeps it in place well. This will most likely last me a lifetime. Might even pass it down to my children 😄The Gorilla Grip Granite Mortar and Pestle set is an absolute kitchen gem! This sturdy, 100% granite set is a game-changer for anyone who loves cooking or grinding spices. The heavy-duty construction ensures durability, while the slip-resistant base makes it incredibly stable on countertops. It's perfect for crushing and grinding herbs, spices, and making guacamole with ease. The natural granite material preserves the flavors of the ingredients and provides just the right texture for various culinary creations. Easy to clean and maintain, this mortar and pestle set has become an indispensable tool in my kitchen. Highly recommended for its quality, functionality, and reliability!Great product love the shape so much better than just a bowl and came with instructions on seasoning itThis mortar and pestle does exactly what I bought it to do: crush stuff. It’s not magical, it doesn’t light up, and it won’t hold a conversation, but it does grind stuff like nobody’s business. Five stars for doing what it was destined to do—be a sturdy bowl with a heavy stick. My cooking is better for it, my spices are afraid of it, and my kitchen feels just a little more old-world mystical.Solid and as describedI bought this for my home chef Husband for Christmas. He occasionally hinted at wanting one for a long time and this year I wracked my brain for something to get for the man who has and loves kitchen gadgets. When he opened it, he was like a giddy child. LOL! He did not expect it and is so happy with the product. It is larger than I thought it would be even though I intentionally bought the 2 cup and quite heavy, but once he seasoned it and used it for the first time, he was very happy with the size and ease of use. The higher sides help contain the seasonings while you grind them, and the weight and non-slip pad provides great control while using it. I am personally benefiting from the different spice grind mixtures he is coming up with! If you are looking for a M&P I would highly recommend this one.Love this! Heavy, durable and the garlic smell will not stick in it.This arrived and recommended a quick wash with water and a break in with dry rice. Easy to do. The granite inside is rough and gives a bite to really grind spices into the fine powder needed for cooking. I got the unfinished - or not polished exterior - both apparently have the rough interior that works so well. The rubber foot comes separately and can be attached or not. I attached mine and it stays put on the counter with only minimal effort. Beats the porcelain one I've had that is too smooth to make grinding spices easy - this one takes a lot less work.
reviews_1s: Why in the heck do you have to season it with garlic? I'm allergic to it and that's the directions! The house smells like poison now, I'm sick as a dog and will NEVER buy this again. It's being returned and buying local! WTHI ordered this mortar and pestle set based on the excellent reviews, but my experience was disappointing. The first set arrived without the pestle. Not a huge issue - I returned it and requested a replacement. To my surprise, the replacement arrived again without the pestle! Frustrated, I decided not to try a third time and requested a refund instead.The first one I received had a big chip in the bowl. I exchanged it for a new one that did not have a chip, but produced an absurd amount of granite dust that took forever to clean. The first time I used it, the lip of the bowl chipped and pieces of granite ended up in the food.I was literally in the process of seasoning it when it snapped, how disappointingThis set was great for the first few uses. Then bits of granite began to flake off into the food. Now huge chunks fall off so I cannot use it any more.Mortar came but pestle missingThis mortar and pestle is made in China! Also, it does NOT have the Gorilla Grip material on the bottom. I am very disappointed.I received defective mortar. I reached out to customer server but they were not helpful in resolving the issue. Instead, they told me to return as it hasn't passed 30 days yet. Looks like they are only interested in resolving if there is a shipment damage where they can claim insurance from shipper. There was small dent inside the mortar, when touched small mortar particle came out.Ordered 1. No pestal in the box. I just wanted them to send me the pestal. Notified Gorilla customer service. They said I had to go through Amazon. Then Amazon said I had to go through Gorilla. Said nevermind and just did an exchange through Amazon. New mortar and pestal set arrives. No pestal in this box either. No more products from this company for me.Nice for looks only, hard to use to make salsa. You will have to press really hard, nothing like the real ones from the old days !!
